The Inkstone Group is a boutique private equity firm founded by accredited investors and operators from McKinsey, Apple, and Goldman Sachs.

Get in Touch What We Do

What We Do

Three ways we
put capital to work.

01
Startups

We meet startups at any stage for angel investment and hands-on support. Our team has advised several startups in education technology and e-commerce.

02
Business Acquisitions

We acquire established businesses with strong fundamentals. We preserve what works, invest in what can grow, and take care of the teams behind them.

03
Real Estate

We invest in residential and commercial opportunities across New York, California, and Nevada.

Our Team

Operators who invest.
Investors who operate.

Former operators and investors with experience spanning strategy, technology, and capital markets. We have built and scaled businesses across four industries and bring that operational depth to every investment we make.

Strategy Engineering Operations Equities Compliance Sales Marketing AI Automation Startup Advising Supply Chain
